what: Result Stability Checks for Empirical R Projects
title: Result Stability Checks for Empirical R Projects
text: Result Stability Checks Empirical R Projects

title: Result Stability Checks for Empirical R Projects
text: resultcheck provides lightweight helpers checking whether empirical results remain unchanged across code revisions, platform differences, package updates. Call snapshot() key outputs (models, tables, derived datasets) analysis scripts detect unintended result drift automatically CI local testing.

title: Result Stability Checks for Empirical R Projects
Result Stability Checks for Empirical R Projects
text: package supports two-phase workflow: Interactive development — run analysis script call snapshot() objects care . first run snapshot saved human-readable .md file. subsequent interactive runs, differences shown prompted update. Automated testing — wrap script setup_sandbox() / run_in_sandbox() / cleanup_sandbox(). Inside run_in_sandbox(), snapshot() switches testing mode: errors immediately snapshot missing changed, making test fail.

title: Result Stability Checks for Empirical R Projects
text: Consider project layout:
code: myproject/ ├── resultcheck.yml       # marks the project root ├── data/ │   └── income.csv        # input data ├── analysis.R            # analysis script └── tests/     └── testthat/         └── test-analysis.R

what: analysis.R — snapshot key results and write output
title: Result Stability Checks for Empirical R Projects
code: data <- read.csv("data/income.csv") model <- lm(income ~ age + education, data = data)  # Snapshot detects unexpected result changes across code revisions. # Interactive: warns and prompts to update when differences are found. # Inside run_in_sandbox(): errors if snapshot is missing or doesn't match. resultcheck::snapshot(model, "income_model")  # Write model summary to an output file dir.create("output", showWarnings = FALSE) write.csv(   as.data.frame(coef(summary(model))),   "output/model_summary.csv" )

title: Result Stability Checks for Empirical R Projects
text: analysis.R changes way alters model, run_in_sandbox() errors immediately. accept change, re-run script interactively, review diff, confirm update.
code: library(testthat) library(resultcheck)  test_that("analysis produces stable results", {    # Run the script in an isolated sandbox.   # Only input data is copied — snapshot files live at the project root and   # are located automatically by find_root(); you do not need to list them.   # You may pass an entire directory instead of individual file paths.   sandbox <- setup_sandbox("data")   on.exit(cleanup_sandbox(sandbox), add = TRUE)    # Errors immediately if any snapshot inside analysis.R doesn't match.   run_in_sandbox("analysis.R", sandbox)    # Verify output files were written.   expect_true(     file.exists(file.path(sandbox$path, "output", "model_summary.csv"))   ) })

title: Result Stability Checks for Empirical R Projects
text: Creates verifies snapshot R object. First interactive run: saves object human-readable .md file _resultcheck_snapshots/<script>/ project root. Subsequent interactive runs: shows diff prompts update. Inside run_in_sandbox(): errors snapshot missing doesn’t match. Snapshots plain text intended committed version control.

title: Result Stability Checks for Empirical R Projects
text: Creates temporary directory copies listed files /directories , preserving path structure relative project root. Directories copied recursively. Snapshot files need listed.

title: Result Stability Checks for Empirical R Projects
text: Runs R script inside sandbox. working directory set sandbox, find_root() snapshot() automatically resolve back original project root snapshots found correctly.

title: Result Stability Checks for Empirical R Projects
text: Removes sandbox directory. Omit argument clean recently created sandbox.

title: Result Stability Checks for Empirical R Projects
text: Locates project root searching upward resultcheck.yml, .Rproj, .git marker. Called automatically snapshot() setup_sandbox(). Place empty resultcheck.yml project root make detection reliable:

text: sandbox Optional. sandbox object created setup_sandbox(). NULL (default), cleans recently created sandbox. force Logical. TRUE (default), removes directory even contains files.

text: Logical indicating success (invisible).

Find Project Root Directory — find_root
text: Finds root directory current R project using various heuristics. function searches markers like resultcheck.yml, .Rproj files, .git directory. running inside sandbox created setup_sandbox(), search original working directory.

title: Find Project Root Directory — find_root
Find Project Root Directory — find_root
text: start_path Optional. directory start searching . NULL (default), uses current working directory stored original working directory sandbox.

title: Find Project Root Directory — find_root
text: path project root directory.

title: Find Project Root Directory — find_root
Get Snapshot File Path — get_snapshot_path
text: Constructs path snapshot file within project's snapshot directory. Snapshot files stored _resultcheck_snapshots/ relative project root, organized script name.

title: Get Snapshot File Path — get_snapshot_path
Get Snapshot File Path — get_snapshot_path
text: name Character. name snapshot (without extension). script_name Optional. name script file creating snapshot. NULL, attempts detect call stack. ext Character. file extension snapshot file (default: "md").

title: Get Snapshot File Path — get_snapshot_path
text: full path snapshot file.

what: Run Code in a Sandbox Environment — run_in_sandbox
title: Run Code in a Sandbox Environment — run_in_sandbox
text: Executes R script within sandbox directory, suppressing messages, warnings, graphical output. useful testing empirical analysis scripts without polluting console creating unwanted plots.

title: Run Code in a Sandbox Environment — run_in_sandbox
code: run_in_sandbox(   script_path,   sandbox = NULL,   suppress_messages = TRUE,   suppress_warnings = TRUE,   capture_output = TRUE )

title: Run Code in a Sandbox Environment — run_in_sandbox
text: script_path Path R script execute. sandbox Optional. sandbox object created setup_sandbox(). NULL (default), uses recently created sandbox. suppress_messages Logical. Whether suppress messages (default: TRUE). suppress_warnings Logical. Whether suppress warnings (default: TRUE). capture_output Logical. Whether capture output (default: TRUE).

title: Run Code in a Sandbox Environment — run_in_sandbox
text: Invisible NULL. function called side effects.

title: Run Code in a Sandbox Environment — run_in_sandbox
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Setup sandbox sandbox <- setup_sandbox(c("data/mydata.rds", "code/analysis.R"))  # Run script in sandbox run_in_sandbox("code/analysis.R", sandbox)  # Clean up cleanup_sandbox(sandbox) } # }

what: Setup a Sandbox Environment for Testing — setup_sandbox
title: Setup a Sandbox Environment for Testing — setup_sandbox
text: Creates temporary directory copies specified files /directories preserving path structure. useful testing empirical analysis scripts isolation.

title: Setup a Sandbox Environment for Testing — setup_sandbox
Setup a Sandbox Environment for Testing — setup_sandbox
text: files Character vector relative file directory paths copy sandbox.  Paths resolved relative project root (found using find_root()); project root determined current working directory used.  path refers directory, entire directory copied recursively.  Absolute paths path traversal attempts (e.g., ..) rejected security. Snapshot files need listed : snapshot() always reads snapshots project root, sandbox. temp_base Optional. Custom location temporary directory. NULL (default), uses tempfile().

title: Setup a Sandbox Environment for Testing — setup_sandbox
text: list class "resultcheck_sandbox" containing: path path created temporary directory id unique timestamp-based identifier sandbox

title: Setup a Sandbox Environment for Testing — setup_sandbox
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Create sandbox and copy files sandbox <- setup_sandbox(c("data/mydata.rds", "code/analysis.R"))  # Use sandbox path print(sandbox$path)  # Clean up when done cleanup_sandbox(sandbox) } # }

title: Interactive Snapshot Testing — snapshot
text: Creates updates snapshot R object interactive analysis. first use, saves object human-readable snapshot file (.md). subsequent uses, compares current object saved snapshot.

title: Interactive Snapshot Testing — snapshot
Interactive Snapshot Testing — snapshot
text: value R object snapshot (e.g., plot, table, model output). name Character. descriptive name snapshot. script_name Optional. name script creating snapshot. NULL, attempts auto-detect call stack.

title: Interactive Snapshot Testing — snapshot
text: Invisible TRUE snapshot matches updated. testing mode, throws error snapshot missing match.

title: Interactive Snapshot Testing — snapshot
text: interactive mode (default), prompts user update differences found emits warning. testing mode (inside testthat run_in_sandbox), throws error snapshot exist match. Snapshots stored _resultcheck_snapshots/ directory relative project root, organized script name.

title: Interactive Snapshot Testing — snapshot
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # In an analysis script (interactive mode): model <- lm(mpg ~ wt, data = mtcars) snapshot(model, "mtcars_model")  # First time: saves the snapshot # Later times: compares, shows differences, prompts to update  # In testing mode (inside run_in_sandbox or testthat): # Errors if snapshot missing or doesn't match } # }

title: resultcheck 0.1.1
text: Fixed snapshot inconsistencies caused variable serialization width directory checks, improving reliability result comparisons.

title: resultcheck 0.1.0
text: snapshot() — create verify human-readable snapshots R objects (models, data frames, tables, vectors, etc.). Interactive mode warns prompts; testing mode (inside run_in_sandbox()) errors mismatch. setup_sandbox() — copy project files /directories temporary directory isolated testing. Accepts individual file paths entire subdirectories. run_in_sandbox() — execute R script inside sandbox working directory set sandbox root, find_root() snapshot() transparently resolve back original project root. cleanup_sandbox() — remove sandbox directory testing. find_root() — locate project root using resultcheck.yml, .Rproj, .git markers.
